heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 6710 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1991 through 1997, to carry out this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title XXIV of , , , known as the Global Climate Change Prevention Act of 1990, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title XXIV to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 101–624104 Stat. 4058section 6701 of this titleNov. 28, 1990
